title: tephroseris crispa
intro: Tephroseris crispa, also known as the Rock Rose or Alpine Daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Tephroseris crispa include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and aiding in wound healing due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Tephroseris crispa can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and its leaves can be dried and used in herbal remedies for a variety of health issues.
